summary: Frontend-only regression testing completed for /app/refgd homepage scroll handoff and path stepper behavior on desktop and mobile viewports. Reported scroll/overlay issues are not reproducible in this run.
action_items: No blocking frontend bugs found in this iteration for the requested scroll/card behaviors.
Optional: run manual real-device touch validation to complement wheel-based mobile automation.
critical_code_review_comments: PathsHorizontalReveal receives desktopFallback but intentionally does not render it (_desktopFallback unused); keep or remove prop for clarity.
No regressions found in current hero-to-paths lock and card-step logic during automated checks.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for requested flows in this run

context_for_next_testing_agent: Desktop (1920x1080) and mobile viewport (390x844) checks passed: hard top scroll lands at paths with card 1, cards progress strictly 1->5 per vertical wheel, horizontal wheel does not change cards, post-card-5 scroll resumes to Telegram/footer, and scrolling back up resets to card 1.
rca of the issue: Previously reported top interception failure was not reproducible. Current code path in CosmicJourney uses beforePaths gate (y <= pathsTop-8) with document-capture wheel/touch listeners, and PathsHorizontalReveal filters by vertical delta only; together they prevented skip/sideways regressions in this test run.
